title: Proximity Chat Only
description: This is going to DISABLE a CHAT in Minecraft
body:
# Proximity Chat Only

**No more typing!**

This mod completely disables the in-game text chat.
When a player tries to type, they will receive a message:
> "This server does not allow chat! Please use Proximity Voice Chat!"

## Features
- Blocks all chat messages.
- Simple feedback message.
- Forces player interaction via voice chat mods (like Simple Voice Chat).

**Installation**
- Put the `.jar` file in your server's `mods` folder.
- Requires **Fabric API**.
